metadata.description: Object info node conversion with fallbacks for missing features

nodes.label: Object Position
nodes.description: Maps to Blender ObjectInfo Location output

nodes.label: Random from Instance ID

custom_function.name: RandomFromObjectID

nodes.fallback: Use Noise texture as alternative if CustomFunction unsupported
nodes.description: Hash-based pseudo-random from object world position

nodes.label: Object Index Placeholder
nodes.note: Hardcoded constant - no dynamic equivalent in standard ShaderGraph
nodes.workaround: Use Material Property Block from C# script for per-instance variation

blender_to_unity_mapping.conversion_notes: Direct mapping. Object space Position in Unity = Blender ObjectInfo Location

alternative_spaces.use_case: When you need world-space object coordinates

blender_to_unity_mapping.conversion_notes: Blender ObjectInfo Color is material-specific custom data. No direct equivalent.
blender_to_unity_mapping.workaround: Use Material Property or Vertex Color instead

blender_to_unity_mapping.conversion_notes: Blender ObjectInfo Alpha is material property. Not available in ShaderGraph.
blender_to_unity_mapping.workaround: Pass via Material Property Block from C#

blender_to_unity_mapping.conversion_notes: Unity has no dynamic object index. Must be set per-instance via Material Property Block.
Material indexing is not applicable in Unity ShaderGraph. Each object has one material.
blender_to_unity_mapping.workaround: Use multiple materials or shader variants

blender_to_unity_mapping.conversion_notes: Pseudo-random based on world position hash. Deterministic but appears random.
blender_to_unity_mapping.fallback_option: Replace CustomFunction with Noise texture if CustomFunction not available

build_instructions.note: Start by creating all required nodes

outputs.note: Wire to material properties or further processing

python_interpreter_config.expected_output: Unity Shader Graph YAML/JSON serialized format

parsing_strategy.nodes: Iterate through shader_graph.nodes array, create node objects

error_handling.missing_custom_function: Fall back to Noise texture node

validation_checks.description: Verify all Position space options are valid
Ensure CustomFunction has valid HLSL body
Verify all connections reference existing nodes
validation_checks.python_code: for conn in connections: assert conn['from_node'] in nodes and conn['to_node'] in nodes

validation_checks.description: Check that unimplemented features have workarounds
validation_checks.python_code: for mapping in blender_to_unity_mapping: assert 'workaround' in mapping or mapping['compatibility_percentage'] > 0

missing_features.reason: Unity ShaderGraph cannot enumerate objects dynamically
missing_features.workaround: Use Material Property Block with C# script per instance

missing_features.reason: Each object in Unity has discrete materials, not indexed
missing_features.workaround: Use shader variants or multiple material assignments
missing_features.implementation_example: Use #pragma shader_feature variants for material-specific logic

missing_features.reason: Not stored as object metadata in Unity
missing_features.workaround: Pass via Vertex Color or Material Property
missing_features.implementation_example: Use vertex color from mesh or vertex attribute

example_usage.description: Python script example to build this shader graph
